sentences.en: Our school is having a talent show next month, and today was the first day of tryouts after class.
sentences.zh: 我們學校下個月要辦才藝表演，今天是放學後試演的第一天。

sentences.en: Bernice signed us both up before asking me, which is exactly the kind of thing Bernice does.
sentences.zh: Bernice 沒問我就先幫我們兩個都報名了，這完全就是 Bernice 會做的事。

sentences.en: Our plan was simple: she would sing, and I would play the guitar, an instrument I have only been learning for two months.
sentences.zh: 我們的計畫很簡單：她負責唱歌，我負責彈吉他，一項我才學了兩個月的樂器。

sentences.en: During the actual tryout, I forgot half the chords halfway through the song, and Bernice just kept singing louder to cover for me.
sentences.zh: 實際試演的時候，我彈到一半忘了一半的和弦，Bernice 只好越唱越大聲來掩護我。

sentences.en: A boy in the row behind us practiced the drums, and honestly, the whole room shook a little every time he hit them.
sentences.zh: 我們後面一排有個男生在練習打鼓，老實說，他每打一下整間房間都會微微震動。

sentences.en: One girl brought her own violin and played something so beautiful that the teacher running the tryouts actually stopped to listen.
sentences.zh: 有個女生自己帶了小提琴，拉的曲子美到連負責試演的老師都停下來聽。

sentences.en: Another student played the piano, and he did not even need sheet music, which impressed everyone in the room, including me.
sentences.zh: 另一個學生彈鋼琴，完全不用看譜，讓在場所有人都印象深刻，包括我。

sentences.en: A small group of students formed a band with a guitar, a drum, and one very enthusiastic tambourine player.
sentences.zh: 有一小群學生組了一個樂團，成員有吉他、鼓，還有一位超級熱情的鈴鼓手。

sentences.en: William's school does not have a talent show, but he insisted on practicing his own act at home anyway: dancing while wearing his robot costume.
sentences.zh: William 的學校沒有才藝表演，但他還是堅持在家練他自己的節目：穿著機器人裝跳舞。

sentences.en: He asked me to practice my guitar while he danced, saying every talented robot needs proper background music.
sentences.zh: 他要求我彈吉他讓他配著跳舞，說每個有才華的機器人都需要適合的背景音樂。

sentences.en: Sophia watched his performance from the kitchen doorway and said it was, without question, the strangest dance she had ever seen.
sentences.zh: Sophia 從廚房門口看他表演，說這絕對是她這輩子看過最奇怪的舞蹈，毫無疑問。

sentences.en: After our real tryout, the teacher told Bernice and me we could join the show, but only if I practiced my guitar part every single day.
sentences.zh: 真正的試演結束後，老師跟我們說可以參加表演，但條件是我每天都要練吉他那部分。

sentences.en: Bernice promised the teacher I would practice, which is a promise she had absolutely no right to make on my behalf.
sentences.zh: Bernice 跟老師保證我一定會練習，但這個承諾她根本沒資格代替我做。

sentences.en: Still, I actually want to get better, so tonight I practiced for a whole thirty minutes without anyone forcing me to.
sentences.zh: 不過我確實想變得更厲害，所以今晚我沒有人逼就自己練了整整三十分鐘。

sentences.en: Perry sat next to me the entire time, tail thumping along to a rhythm that had absolutely nothing to do with the actual song.
sentences.zh: Perry 全程都坐在我旁邊，尾巴跟著一個完全跟這首歌無關的節奏拍打著。

quiz.question: What instrument does Coco play for the talent show tryout?
What does William do at home to prepare his own act?
options: Dancing while wearing his robot costume.

quiz.question: What condition does the teacher give for letting Coco and Bernice join the show?
options: Coco must practice guitar every single day.
They must find a new song.
Bernice must stop singing so loud.
They must add a third member.
